productDisplayName: ADIDAS Neo Men Court Sequence Black Shoes
description: Premium materials like suede and aniline leathers enhance the look of these Basketball style midcut shoes. A part of the adidas NEO range of fashion footwear, the adidas Court Sequence Mid combines lightweight breathable comfort and flexibility that makes sportswear more fun and glam!UpperSuede and aniline leather upper with perforations in the forefootAdidas patented 3-Stripes on the midfoot for enhanced shoe structure and styleLacing system for snug FitSoft leather tongue lined with padded meshPadded sockliner for all-day comfortBranding at the back of the collarMidsoleAdidas Vibetouch enhanced comfort midsole for lightweight comfort and impact protectionOutsoleGrooves and a suction point at the toe for great tractionShoe careBrush dirt and dust off the surface and treat surface with leather impregnation sprayDo not wash or store in direct sunlight
